seoTitle: Silkstone vs Silkwood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Silkstone and Silkwood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Silkstone and Silkwood.
heading: Silkstone vs Silkwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Silkstone, Queensland and Silkwood, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Silkwood has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Silkstone (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Silkstone or Silkwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Silkstone has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Silkwood scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Silkstone scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Silkwood scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Silkstone or Silkwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Silkwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
